body: review-spec 2026-06-21 APPROVE — carry into implement: (1) the parity corpus (program+input pairs) is itself a committed deliverable, enumerate it under tests/. (2) ac-02 needs a CONCRETE assertable artifact for byte-equal passthrough — expose the program dovetail ran (e.g. echoed/returned), assert == input, not just an internal invariant. (3) ac-08 forward-compat to still-open choice 0013 — stamp shape is best-effort, not validatable against a fixed schema yet. (4) ac_type coverage correct (only ac-07 doc).
